description: Los Huistas are a powerful Guatemalan criminal organization based in Huehuetenango, near the Mexican border. Founded in the late 1990s, they control a strategic drug trafficking route for cocaine, methamphetamine, and heroin from Central America to the United States. They have evolved from transporters to producers of methamphetamine and money launderers, infiltrating state institutions. The group maintains a centralized hierarchy and is led by Eugenio Darío Molina-López until his capture in 2026.

country_links.evidence_quote: han comenzado a importar precursores químicos de China para producir metanfetamina.
country_links.context: Los Huistas import chemical precursors from China to produce methamphetamine.

country_links.evidence_quote: Inicialmente, las operaciones en la región estaban controladas por traficantes mexicanos independientes y carteles como Sinaloa y del Golfo...
country_links.context: Los Huistas transport drugs into Mexico and coordinate with Mexican cartels.

country_links.evidence_quote: El grupo controla una ruta estratégica crítica para el tránsito de cocaína, metanfetaminas y heroína desde Centroamérica hacia Estados Unidos...
country_links.context: Los Huistas route drugs through their network from Central America to the United States.
